# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Tribal Sovereignty vs. CFTC Authority: Federal Law Clash Over Prediction Markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/tribal-sovereignty-vs-cftc-authority-federal-law-clash-over-prediction-markets.html): A legal battle pitting tribal gaming statutes against CFTC jurisdiction has emerged as Native American tribes seek to operate prediction markets under federal Indian gaming law, challenging the CFTC's regulatory monopoly over event contracts.
- [Kalshi traders weigh Maine Democratic field after Platner suspends campaign](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-traders-weigh-maine-democratic-field-after-platner-suspends-campaign.html): Graham Platner ended his Maine Democratic campaign, prompting Kalshi prediction-market traders to immediately reprice odds on who will emerge as the party's next leading contender.
- [Polymarket launches major U.S. comeback campaign after four-year ban](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-launches-major-u-s-comeback-campaign-after-four-year-ban.html): Polymarket has launched an aggressive re-entry campaign targeting U.S. users in 2025, reversing the four-year exclusion that followed its 2022 CFTC settlement.
- [Kalshi Loses Bid to Escape New York Sports Licensing Rules](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-loses-bid-to-escape-new-york-sports-licensing-rules.html): A New York court ruled against Kalshi, finding the prediction-markets platform cannot avoid the state's sports licensing requirements, in a decision that could reshape how event-contract operators navigate state oversight.
- [Burry bets on sportsbooks, predicts regulation will curb prediction markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/burry-bets-on-sportsbooks-predicts-regulation-will-curb-prediction-markets.html): Legendary investor Michael Burry disclosed long positions in DraftKings and Flutter in Q1 2025, publicly predicting that incoming regulation will constrain prediction-market platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket.
- [Kalshi loses bid to override New York state gambling laws in federal court](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-loses-bid-to-override-new-york-state-gambling-laws-in-federal-court.html): A federal judge rejected Kalshi's attempt to use its CFTC-regulated status to preempt New York state gambling laws, dealing the prediction-markets platform a significant legal setback.
- [Google Bans Prediction Market Transactions, Draws Industry Backlash](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/google-bans-prediction-market-transactions-draws-industry-backlash.html): Google has banned transactions related to prediction markets on its platform, a move that has prompted significant pushback from the prediction market industry.
- [Polymarket Opens U.S. Marketing Push After Regulatory Thaw](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-opens-u-s-marketing-push-after-regulatory-thaw.html): Polymarket has launched its first formal U.S.-facing marketing campaign, marking a significant strategic shift toward domestic customer acquisition following years of blocking American users.
- [Love Island Betting Markets Expand as Reality TV Contracts Go Mainstream](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/love-island-betting-markets-expand-as-reality-tv-contracts-go-mainstream.html): Prediction markets have added Love Island as a tradeable event, marking a significant push by platforms to attract retail bettors through popular reality-TV programming in 2025.
- [Polymarket launches U.S. influencer blitz, MLB deals to rebuild trust post-ban](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-launches-u-s-influencer-blitz-mlb-deals-to-rebuild-trust-post-ban.html): Polymarket announced a broad U.S. marketing campaign on July 8, 2026, including TikTok influencer deals, Major League Baseball partnerships, and media agreements with CNN and CNBC as it works to re-establish credibility following a four-year domestic ban.
